title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
